而家條formula
Lv 1= Masked Form

Lv 5= 1拉中期upgrade

Lv XX= 1拉後期upgrade

Lv 50= 以前3拉(用新system) +2拉 upgrade/final

Lv X= 宿敵變rider

Lv 99=??

Lv(3月之後)= final form
